title: TSectionProfile
description: TSectionProfile: T-shaped profile with constant flange thickness.

Height.description: Full depth between extreme fibres of the web and flange. Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

Width.description: Full width of the flange. Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

WebThickness.description: Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

FlangeThickness.description: Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

RootRadius.description: Fillet radius between inner face of flanges and faces of the web. Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

ToeRadius.description: Fillet radius at the outer edge of the flanges. Value need to be smaller or equal than the flange thickness. Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

MirrorAboutLocalY.description: If true, the section is mirrored about its local y-axis, resulting in upside down T-shape.

Edges.description: Edge curves that matches the dimensions in the global XY-plane.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
